scripts.dev: npx wrangler dev --local & cd src/pages && npx vite
scripts.db:init: npx drizzle-kit generate && npx wrangler d1 migrations apply temp --local && npx wrangler d1 execute temp --local --file=src/worker/db/seed.sql
scripts.db:init:remote: npx drizzle-kit generate && npx wrangler d1 migrations apply temp --remote && npx wrangler d1 execute temp --remote --file=src/worker/db/seed.sql
scripts.setup: pnpm install && cd src/pages && pnpm install && pnpm db:init
